arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eyeing up three big names this summer if they get the boost of qualifying for the Champions League. The Blues are not yet guaranteed to finish in the top four after a recent slump in form, so it remains to be seen if they’ll be able to sign the players they want. arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres sends two-word message after fresh Arsenal transfer stance emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal-linked striker Viktor Gyokeres was on target again for Sporting CP as he continued his fine run of form for the Portuguese giants. Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta is said to be an admirer of Gyokeres as they face a summer of intense links and speculation over a move.

arts.ttl: 'I quit Arsenal for Real Madrid – one club was a total nightmare and I hated it'
arts.sum: Former Premier League forward Nicolas Anelka left Arsenal to join Real Madrid in a blockbuster move back in 1999, but regretted it the second he touched down in the Spanish capital
